title: Independence Day Celebration on 15th August
content: NivassHub will celebrate Independence Day on 15th August 2024 with flag hoisting at 8 AM, cultural programs, and breakfast for all residents. Volunteers please contact the society office.

title: Society Elections – New Committee 2024-25
content: Elections for the new Managing Committee for 2024-25 will be held on 30th June 2024. Nominations open till 27th June. All flat owners eligible to vote and contest. Contact office for nomination forms.

title: Yoga Camp – Every Sunday 6 AM
content: Free yoga sessions every Sunday at 6:00 AM in the community garden area. Open to all residents. A certified yoga instructor will conduct the sessions. Bring your own mat.

title: Monsoon Preparedness – Action Plan
content: With monsoon approaching, the maintenance team has completed waterproofing of terraces, cleared all drains and gutters, and ensured backup generators are serviced. Report any seepage immediately.

title: Blood Donation Camp – 1st July
content: NivassHub in association with City Blood Bank is organizing a Blood Donation Camp on 1st July 2024 from 9 AM to 1 PM in the Community Hall. All residents above 18 years are encouraged to donate.

title: EV Charging Points Now Operational
content: Four EV charging points are now fully operational in the basement parking area. Usage is on first-come-first-serve basis. Charging rate: ₹12 per unit. Contact security for access card.

title: Monthly Cleanliness Drive – Last Sunday
content: Join the monthly society cleanliness drive every last Sunday at 7 AM. Last month saw 45 residents participate. This month let's aim for 60! Gloves and bags provided. Together we make NivassHub cleaner.

title: Congratulations – NivassHub wins Best Society Award
content: NivassHub Society has won the Best Residential Society Award 2024 by the City Municipal Corporation. This is a testament to the effort of all residents and committee members. Thank you all!

title: Children's Summer Camp Results
content: Results of the Summer Camp 2024 competitions: Painting – Aarav Mehta (A-101), Science Quiz – Ananya Patil (B-202), Sports – Rohan Bhat (D-101). Prizes will be distributed at the AGM on 26th June.

title: Society WhatsApp Group Rules Updated
content: Updated rules for the society WhatsApp group: Only society-related information to be shared. No forwarded messages, no political content, no advertisements. Violations will result in removal from the group.

title: Digital Payment – Maintenance Fee Now Accepted Online
content: Maintenance fees can now be paid via UPI, NEFT, or RTGS. UPI ID: nivasshub@paytm. Bank details and receipts will be shared via email. Online payments are encouraged to reduce physical visits.

title: Library Reopens with New Books
content: The society library has been restocked with 150 new books – fiction, non-fiction, children's, and regional language books. Library timings: Mon-Sat 4 PM – 8 PM. Borrowing limit: 2 books for 14 days.

title: Fit India Movement – Walk Challenge
content: NivassHub launches a 30-day walk challenge! Residents must walk 10,000 steps daily. Track on any step-counter app. Submit screenshot on society WhatsApp by midnight. Top walkers win prizes at AGM!

title: Senior Citizen Meet – Every 2nd Saturday
content: Senior residents of NivassHub are invited for a monthly meet every 2nd Saturday at 10 AM in the Club House. Games, refreshments, and health talks. Transport assistance available within the campus.

title: Terrace Garden Project – Join Us!
content: NivassHub is starting a terrace garden project. Residents interested in gardening can adopt a planting spot on Block A terrace. Saplings, soil, and pots will be provided. Contact: Mr. Prasad Murthy, D-301.
